plugins.name: vasana-system
plugins.description: Vasana System - interaction choreographies for collaborative cognition

plugins.name: research-toolkit
plugins.description: Relentless self-reflexive dialectical thinking that questions its own premises. Investigation protocols (DIP, STONK), epistemic depth (text-deconstruction, negative-dialectical-spiral), dialectic testing, frame rotation, iterative verification, financial analysis

plugins.name: makers-toolkit
plugins.description: Build-discipline skills in command-with-reason register: system-pilot (engineering discipline for building deterministic systems) and intrinsic-prompt-design (meta-methodology of prompt design)

plugins.name: security-toolkit
plugins.description: Threat-detection and dangerous-action-blocking hooks: tiered prompt-injection detection with allowlist, dangerous git operation blocking (push to main, force push, reset --hard, etc.), and Desktop Commander safeguards
